items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - REFLEX 1.0
items.description:
Let your light shine with Reflex – a mirrored take on Burberry’s Lola bag. This limited-edition style features a reflective mirrored surface and chain strap, while floating Thomas Burberry Monogram hardware frames the silhouette. 
Item created for the 1.0 blocky avatar.

items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - GEM 1.0
items.description:
Cut with a glistening jewel-like facade, Gem is a charismatic and confident virtual Lola bag that features a polished Thomas Burberry Monogram and coordinating chain strap. 
Item created for the 1.0 blocky avatar.
